Group Structure – DANWAY Group

  • Danway EME (OPC) — EPC Main Contractor for T-2180. Full MEICA D&B: pump design, surge analysis, hypochlorination, MV/LV, SCADA, all buildings. Principal Contractor.
  • Danway Emirates LLC — In-house UAE manufacturer of Form 4b LV MCCs, MV starters, control panels, switchboards. Proven on N-12192.1, N-17765, N-20228.
  • Danway LLC — Manufacturing & Trading. GCC supply chain & procurement backbone.

Sector Capabilities

  • Water — Pump Stations — 4 completed TRANSCO/ADWEA water transmission PS as MEICA Principal. Currently: N-20228 Mirfa C (TAQA Water, direct) + N-20068 MODON (ongoing).
  • Power — HV/MV Substations — 28+ × 132kV delivered. Active: DEWA (22 substations), TAQA Transmission Project Nexus (3 × 132/33kV), TRANSCO N-18811 (completed May 2026).
  • Industrial — EGA Jebel Ali (AED 2B+, 30 years), ALBA 6th Potline, Ma'aden KSA — complex live-env E&I.
  • Oil & Gas — ADNOC Ruwais, Aramco Hawiyah, ENOC, BAPCO, Takreer — MEP & E&I GCC.

N-20228Mirfa C Pumping Station TAQA TransmissionAES2024–Oct'26 Additional pump group · DN1200 CS pipeline · 33kV SWG Building · ECB fit-out · Pump house civil & mech · Valve chambers · MV/LV distribution · SCADA & LDC integration Additional pump group — full E&M scope to increase capacity · DN1200 CS pipeline supply to Madinat Zayed · 33kV Switchgear Building electrical fit-out · ECB construction & fit-out · Pump house civil works & mechanical installation · Valve chambers & external civil works · MV/LV distribution, earthing & lightning protection · Instrumentation, SCADA & LDC integration ● Ongoing

On all four TRANSCO/ADWEA pump stations, Danway EME delivered the complete MEICA scope from detailed design through FAC — same pump types (VSP), same EVSDS VFD spec, same SCADA/PLC architecture, same surge methodology. Same team. Same spec. T-2180 is a continuation.

Scope Understanding
PWPS & RWPS — Full Scope by Discipline
PWPS — Potable Water  ·  3 Groups · 20 Pumps · OSEC Hypochlorination
Grp 1 – HC: 5 pumps · 80 L/s · 75m HGL · VSP
Grp 2 – HC Hills: 3 pumps · 17 L/s · 110m HGL
Grp 3 – HW: 5 pumps · 80 L/s · 65m HGL
RWPS — Recycled Water  ·  2 Groups · 14 Pumps
Grp 1 – RW1: 8 pumps · 780 L/s · 95m HGL
Grp 2 – RW2: 6 pumps · 300 L/s · 115m HGL
Civil & Structural
PWPS Buildings
Concrete reservoirs & roof slabs · Pump hall & electrical complex · Hypochlorination building · Generator room · Fire pump building · Guard house & boundary wall · Substation structure · Surge vessel chamber · Underground pipe trenches & valve chambers
RWPS Buildings
Recycled water reservoirs · Pump hall & electrical complex · Fire pump building · Generator room · Guard house · Substation · Surge vessel chamber · Pipe trenches & valve chambers
Common Civil Works
Geotechnical investigation · Topographic survey · Foundation design · Piling works · Shoring & dewatering · Site drainage · External roads & hard-standing · Boundary landscaping
PWPS Only: Hypochlorination Building
Mechanical
Main Pumps
PWPS: 20 VSPs (Vertical Spindle) with EVSDS VFDs · RWPS: 14 pumps (H/V split-casing) with VFDs · Factory performance test (H, Q, η)
Station Pipework
DI PN10/16/25 · Restrained joints · FBE-coated above ground · Cement-lined & zinc-coated buried · DN50–DN800
Valves & Equipment
Motorised BFVs · Non-slam check valves · Flow control valves · Basket strainers · Bladder-type surge vessels · EOT cranes · Drain / sump pumps
HVAC — Both Stations
Mechanical ventilation: pump halls, cable cellar, battery room · A/C: control room, MCC room, offices
PWPS Only: OSEC Hypochlorination — On-site NaOCl generation, electrolysers, dosing pumps, Cl₂/pH analysers
Electrical
MV Supply
22kV TAQA MV supply (TAQA-D for PWPS · TAQA-T for RWPS) · Ring Main Unit (RMU) · 22/0.4kV dry-type cast-resin transformers · MV cables & terminations
LV Switchgear / MCC
Form 4b Type 6 LVMCC (Danway Emirates in-house) · EVSDS VFDs for all pump motors · PFCC · Distribution boards · TAQA metering cabinets
Power Resilience
UPS with battery backup (3-hr autonomy) · Emergency standby diesel generators · Automatic change-over
Cables & Protection
All power, control & signal cables · Local Control Panels per pump group · Earthing & lightning protection · Cable trays & containment
PWPS Only: Hypochlorination electrical — LV switchgear, transformer-rectifiers, electrolyser MCC
ICA / SCADA
Field Instrumentation
Flow meters (electromagnetic) · Pressure transmitters & gauges · Level sensors · pH, conductivity, turbidity, residual Cl₂ · Hydrogen detection · Smart water quality analysers
PLC / SCADA
Dual redundant hot-standby PLCs (IEC 61131-3) · 25% spare I/O minimum · HMI touchscreens per pump group · Redundant SCADA servers, historian & engineering workstations · Remote TAQA LDC integration
Automation
Pump sequencing, load-sharing & protection · Motorised valve auto-control · Surge vessel pressure monitoring · Water quality auto-dosing (PWPS) · Alarm management
Security & Comms
CCTV & access control · Redundant fibre-optic LAN ring · Cybersecurity-compliant architecture
Testing & Commissioning
FAT · SAT · Loop checks · End-to-end SCADA integration test · As-builts & O&M manuals
Site Model
T-2180 Site — Al Hudayriat Island West · 3D Interactive Model
Site: Al Hudayriat Island West, Abu Dhabi
GWT: ~0 m NADD — continuous dewatering required
MV: 22kV TAQA loop — 30m cable per station

Agenda Item 5 — Civil Scope Strategy
Civil Scope Construction Plan
Package 1
Industrial Buildings
Danway EME — Civil
TAQA Registered — Industrial Buildings
Pump hall superstructure, ECB, hypochlorination building (PWPS), generator room, guard house, boundary wall, gate structures, external roads & hard standing. Danway EME directly TAQA-registered for industrial buildings — no sub-sub interface.
Package 2
Concrete Reservoir Tanks
SEDE — Societe Egyptienne d'Entreprises (Al Nowais Group)
TAQA Approved — Concrete Reservoir & Tanks
Reservoir foundations, RCC walls, roof slabs, internal baffles, waterproofing, sump, pipe penetrations with puddle flanges. Will be assigned to SEDE, a sister company under Al Nowais Investments — same group as Danway EME. Delivered identical scope in successful projects on N-4277, N-7396, N-12192.1, N-17765. Comprising single group liability.
Package 3
Piling Works
TAQA Approved Foundation / Piling Contractor
From TAQA Piling Approved List
CFA or driven piling confirmed per geotech investigation results (Month 1). Pile design under supervision of civil design consultant. Pile testing: static load tests & dynamic tests. All piling subcontractors from TAQA Piling Approved Contractor List. Reclaimed island / high water table experience mandatory.
Package 4
Shoring & Dewatering
TAQA Approved Shoring Specialist (confirmed at award)
From TAQA Specialist Approved List
Deep excavation: sheet pile or CBP wall (10–12m depth). Continuous dewatering Month 2–12: submersible pumps + wellpoints (reclaimed island, high water table). Emergency diesel centrifugal backup pump.

All 4 civil packages activate simultaneously from Month 2 — the primary enabler of the 24-month Design & Build programme. SEDE's reservoir civil (Package 2) runs in parallel with Danway EME buildings (Package 1) and piling (Package 3). This is proven on N-17765 (completed Sep 2024).

Agenda Item 6 — Construction Programme
24-Month Programme — 6 Overlapping Phases
Phase Overview
Phase 1 · M1–M2Mobilisation · Site setup, offices, survey, geotechnical, design kick-off
Phase 2 · M2–M7Substructure · Piling, shoring, dewatering, earthworks, foundations, reservoir substructure
Phase 3 · M6–M14Superstructure & Mechanical · Buildings, reservoir walls/roof, DI pipework, mechanical installation
Phase 4 · M12–M19Electrical & ICA · MCCs, VFDs, cabling, SCADA, instruments, UPS, lighting, LV works
Phase 5 · M17–M22Testing & Commissioning · Loop checks, FAT, SAT, energisation, pump commissioning, SCADA/RTU integration
Phase 6 · M22–M24Handover · PAC, snag clearance, O&M manuals, as-built drawings, training, FAC preparation
Critical Path Items
→ Geotech within Month 1 (drives piling design & dewatering scheme)
→ Piling Month 2–4 (floating island — reclaimed land, high water table)
→ TAQA Design Approval IFC by M4 (gating long-lead procurement)
→ Long-Lead Procurement Pumps M4, MCCs M6, Generators M6 (14–20 wk lead)
→ Surge Analysis Final report M8 (drives vessel sizing & order)
→ 22kV Energisation Month 17 (TAQA coordination — minimum 6-month lead notice)
→ Dewatering Continuous Month 2–12 (reclaimed island critical path)

T-2180 Project HSE Plan — Key Elements
HSE LeadershipQA/HSE Manager on-site full-time. Daily toolbox talks, weekly walks.
MODON ComplianceFull alignment to MODON HSE Requirements Rev. 03 — submitted with bid.
High-Risk ActivitiesConfined space (pump pit), deep excavation, lifting (pumps/MCCs), dewatering, 22kV work — all with JSAs.
CertificationsISO 45001:2018 (OHS) · ISO 14001:2015 (EMS) — third-party certified.
PPE & AccessMandatory: harness for work >1.8m, H2S monitor in confined spaces, gas detector in hypo room.
Emergency ResponseWritten ERP with assembly points, first-aider ratio 1:25, AED on site.
EnvironmentalDewatering discharge to MODON storm drain network (treated). No untreated dewatering direct to sea.
Subcontractor HSEAll subs inducted, HSE plan submitted & approved before mobilisation. Danway EME HSE officer supervises.
SustainabilityStar Taqdeer 2026 (labour welfare). Eco-friendly OSEC hypochlorination — no liquid chlorine transport.
Incident ReportingMODON online portal + TAQA IMIS reporting within 24 hrs. Danway EME HSE Manager review within 48 hrs.
Agenda Item 3 — Quality Assurance Plan
Quality Assurance — ISO Certified · ITP-Controlled
Certifications & Accreditations
ISO 9001:2015Quality Management — mechanical, electrical, ICA, design
ISO 14001:2015Environmental Management System
ISO 45001:2018Occupational Health & Safety
TAQA Approved ContractorPumping stations
ADNOC/ADIPEC ApprovedMechanical, electrical, ICA contractor
MODON RegisteredN-20068 active, Reem Hills Phase 2
Design Control (D&B)
Deliverables RegisterACONEX managed, rev-controlled. All submittals tracked.
Third-Party CheckIndependent structural check (reservoirs). Surge analysis by HAL/Deltares.
Clash DetectionRevit BIM coordination model — MEP clashes resolved prior to IFC
ITP Framework — T-2180 Inspection & Test Plan
DisciplineKey Hold Points (H) / Witness (W)
Civil / ConcreteH: Pour approval, waterproof membrane, cube test. W: Pile test, backfill compaction.
PilingH: Pile design approval, static load test. W: CFA installation, integrity test.
Mechanical — PumpsH: Factory performance test (flow, head, efficiency). W: Dimensional check, coupling alignment.
Mechanical — PipeworkH: Hydro test 1.5×DP. W: Weld RT/UT, joint restraint, valve stroke test.
Surge VesselsH: ASME stamp review, pressure test certificate. W: Factory bladder test.
MCC / SwitchgearH: FAT at Danway MCC workshop (TAQA witnessed). W: Busbar torque, HV test, protection relay setting.
VFDsH: Loop test prior to energisation. W: FAT — speed ramp, fault simulation.
22kV CablesH: HV Tan Delta test post install. W: Joint/termination records.
SCADA / PLCH: FAT (factory — TAQA + Danway witness). H: SAT (site — integrated test). W: Loop check sheets, signal verify.
Instruments / CalibrationH: Calibration certificates, OIML compliance. W: Loop test, zero/span check.
OSEC HypochlorinationH: Cl₂ output performance test. W: Factory commissioning, DI water quality test.
Reservoir (TAQA-D)H: Internal epoxy coating dry film thickness. H: Water tightness test (3m fill 24hr). W: Waterproofing application.

All ITPs are subject to MODON Engineer / TAQA approval before construction.
